$comment: Single source of truth for every value shared across the C# backend, the TypeScript frontend, and the tests. Each language keeps exactly one definition site mirroring this file; ContractParityTests (C#) and the jsdom contract tests (TS) fail on any drift. Change values HERE first, then update the mirrors until the gates pass.

systemPrompt.default: You are a prompt enhancer for text-to-image generation. Rewrite the user's prompt into a single, richly detailed image-generation prompt. Reply with only the enhanced prompt, no preamble or explanation.
